news.title: MHSAA boys basketball: Free Press 2026 All-East teams

news.summary_en: Here are the Free Press' selection of the top high school boys basketball players in the city of Detroit for the 2025-26 season.

news.title: The future of one of Michigan’s oldest charter schools is uncertain
news.summary_en: Board members declined to advance a one‑year renewal, citing years of weak academic performance at the east‑side Detroit charter school.

news.title: Ishpeming's Mya Hemmer voted the Freep Buffalo Wild Wings Girls Athlete of the Week
news.summary_en: Congratulations to Mya Hemmer of Ishpeming for being voted the Detroit Free Press Buffalo Wild Wings Girls Prep Athlete of the Week.

news.title: Here's who Freep readers voted the MHSAA boys basketball player of the year
news.summary_en: Detroit Free Press readers made their voices heard on who they thought was the boys basketball player of the year for the 2025-2026 MHSAA basketball season.

news.title: Whitmer’s inaction has real consequences
news.summary_en: U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon and U.S. Rep. Tim Walberg: A new federal program would expand options for Michigan families.

news.title: Grosse Pointe North grad wins 'Jeopardy!' for 10th time. When he plays
news.summary_en: Jamie Ding, an alumnus of Grosse Pointe North High School, has won 10 straight "Jeopardy!" games. Here's what to know.

news.title: Rare mural peeling off wall of Dearborn's Fordson High
news.summary_en: A historic mural inside Fordson High School's library is more than halfway detached from the wall, and preservationists are hoping to save it.

news.title: Plymouth Canton Educational Park students walk out to oppose ICE
news.summary_en: Students walked out of class at Plymouth, Canton and Salem High Schools on Wednesday, March 25, morning to support immigrants and oppose ICE.

news.title: U-M president to testify on Capitol Hill over alleged Chinese espionage
news.summary_en: Domenico Grasso is likely to face questions on the smuggling cases against three Chinese citizens at U-M.

news.title: Parent sues Grosse Pointe schools over ban tied to LGBTQ+ flag post
news.summary_en: A parent claims Grosse Pointe school district violated his free speech rights by banning him from district property.

news.title: Detroit woman pleads guilty to $2.5 million student aid scam
news.summary_en: Investigators began looking into the case after school officials noticed a series of applications from the same online high school.

news.title: Goodrich turns belief into reality with dominant undefeated season
news.summary_en: Goodrich girls basketball finished the season 29-0 and the champions of MHSAA Division 2 with a 55-44 win over Tecumseh.

news.title: Goodrich girls basketball receives MHSAA Division 2 state title medals
news.summary_en: Goodrich beat Tecumseh 55-44 in the MHSAA Division 2 girls basketball state championship on Saturday, March 21.

news.title: Goodrich girls basketball finishes perfect season with MHSAA D-2 title
news.summary_en: Goodrich beat Tecumseh, 55-44, in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 2 state championship on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.

news.title: Young star takes over D-3 title game for Lumen Christi's first trophy
news.summary_en: Jackson Lumen Christi defeated Pewamo-Westphalia 52-36 in Division 3 state final to win its first MHSAA girls basketball championship.

news.title: Jackson Lumen Christi receives MHSAA Division 3 state title trophies
news.summary_en: Jackson Lumen Christi beat Pewamo-Westphalia 52-36 in the Division 3 state championship game on Saturday, March 21.

news.title: Autry's heroic Detroit Renaissance run ends with heartbreak
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 1 state championship game on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.

news.title: Muskegon girls basketball receives MHSAA Division 1 state title medals
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the Division 1 girls basketball state championship game on Saturday, March 21.

news.title: Muskegon outlasts Detroit Renaissance for MHSAA D-1 girls basketball title
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 1 state championship on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.

news.title: UP community travels 6 hours to watch Ishpeming girls basketball win D-4 title
news.summary_en: Ishpeming girls basketball won the MHSAA girls basketball Division 4 state title, supported by fans who traveled 400 miles through a snowstorm.

news.title: Macomb school employees accused of misconduct in bus parked at Walmart
news.summary_en: Two Macomb Intermediate School District Employees are under investigation after they were accused professional misconduct on a school bus.

news.title: Ishpeming basketball presented with MHSAA Division 4 title medals
news.summary_en: Ishpemingbeat Portland St. Patrick 48-28 in the Division 4 girls basketball state championship game on Saturday, March 21.

news.title: Mya Hemmer's historic game anchors Ishpeming to MHSAA girls D-4 title
news.summary_en: Ishpeming girls basketball wins the MHSAA Division 4 finals over Portland St. Patrick led by Mya Hemmer's 18 points, 17 rebounds, 9 blocks, 6 steals.
